name: Dipped Peanut Butter Sandwich Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup White chocolate chips or Semisweet chocolate chips or Milk chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by Taste of Home Magazine, December/January
1994 Preparation Time: 2:00
Note: 1 sleeve (4 ounces) round butter-flavored crackers.
1. Spread peanut butter on half of the crackers; top with remaining crackers to make sandwiches. Refrigerate.
2. In a double boiler over simmering water, melt choice of chocolate chips and shortening, stirring until smooth.
3. Dip sandwiches and place on waxed paper until chocolate hardens.
Yield: 1 1/2 dozen
Shown in a bowl, lined with linen napkin, part chocolate dipped, part white chocolate dipped.
